reviews.review_description: Good idea. Not much good execution. Unnecessary too hard (1 difficulty level) so all the nice features (drop boxes, eplosives..) don't matter then.. Enemy bullets are too overwhelming with no sense.. I would give 5 stars if it becomes playable and replayable..

Good graphics
Good challenge
Pick up and play arcade spirit. 

Has all the elements I need to get my heart pumping with the continuous onslaught of enemies and a simple but pulse pounding soundtrack that keeps you ready for more. 

$7 and I’m happy

reviews.review_title: I  can't pronoune it, but like it!
reviews.review_description:
It is actually a fun shooter game!  It doesn't get much acknowledgment on FB or anywhere else, I think it is because of the name. 

I tried to record myself playing this game for my VR games review page on FB, but it will NOT allow me to do so.  I was going to give this a good review and possibly draw people to it, but without gameplay video, there's nothing I can do. 

It is fun, challenging, and a little silly, but that adds to the fun!

This is a fun shooter, well presented that keeps you on your toes.

However this seriously needs leaderboards to have any longevity.

I am in a position to share a favourable video review of this game with many people, unfortunately the developer has disabled the video recording capability (first time I have come across a developer doing this) for some reason.

Worth the asking price.
